name: Loksa (Harju, Estonia)
description: A red field bearing a golden oak tree above two golden boats at the hoist, with red-and-white horizontal stripes across the fly half (a banner of the Loksa arms).

features.symbolism: the red field of the Loksa arms

features.role: barry of red and white across the fly half
golden oak tree of the Loksa arms
two golden boats at the foot of the oak
